params.name: Beast God Skull Sculpture
params.description: Upon learning of the fall of the Beast God, Earth's Will commissioned the creation of a series of statues based on its skull's design. These sculptures serve two purposes: to commemorate the historic moment of overcoming formidable enemies and to be gifted to extraordinary time travelers, allowing them to share the joy of this victory together!
params.ss1:
